caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT MAN" and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a studio setting. He wears large over-ear headphones and a gold chain. A professional microphone is positioned directly in front of him. In the background, a wall features logos and text, including "BOSS HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins by looking forward and gesturing with his right hand. He then shifts his gaze to the side, looking away from the microphone. He eventually returns his focus forward, maintaining a serious expression while continuing to talk. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and head as he interacts with someone off-screen.
